top_findings.title: No README.md deliverable
top_findings.evidence: run_dir has no README.md (ls shows only app.py, models.py, test_app.py, requirements.txt, TASK.md); REQUIREMENTS.json R11 requires setup/run docs
top_findings.suggestion: Add a README.md documenting install (pip install -r requirements.txt), how to run (python app.py), and how to run tests (pytest)
